title: Bostik PVA Glue 118ml - Multi-Purpose Solvent-Free Glue - Dries Clear - UKCA & CE Approved - Ideal for Arts - Crafts - School & DIY Projects
features: Versatile Multi-Purpose Adhesive: Bonds paper, card, wood, fabric, and more – perfect for scrapbooking, card making, modelling, and school projects.
Safe & Solvent-Free Formula: UKCA & CE approved; low odour and washable for worry-free crafting with kids.
Dries Clear for a Professional Finish: Achieve neat, invisible bonds and even create glossy finishes or mix for finger painting and slime making.
Convenient & Easy to Use: Supplied in a handy squeeze bottle with re-sealable cap to prevent drying out.
Contents: 1x Bostik PVA Glue, Colour: White, 118ml bottle
Easy to use bottle with resealable cap
description: From the manufacturer Bostik PVA Glue Essential for any craft project Bostik PVA Glue is a multipurpose, solvent free white glue which dries clear. It’s perfect for arts and crafts amongst adults and kids, and sticks lots of materials, including paper, card, wood and fabric. Bostik PVA Glue comes in an easy-to-use bottle with a resealable cap, and even washes out of clothes. Suitable uses Ideal for most arts and crafts projects, scrapbooks, card making, modelling and school projects. Use it to make slime, create a glossy finish on projects, or mix with powder for finger painting. Advantages at a glance Multipurpose, solvent free white glue which dries clear Easy to use bottle with resealable cap Perfect for arts and crafts projects at home and at school Ideal for making slime
